name: US State Income Tax Rates Dataset 2026
description: 50 states + DC tax brackets by filing status, top marginal rates, standard deductions, capital gains treatment, property tax rates, sales tax rates. 2026 effective rates.

data.name: Alabama
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income

data.name: Alaska
data.capitalGains: No state tax on capital gains

data.name: Arizona
data.capitalGains: 25% exclusion on net capital gains (effective 1.875% rate)

data.name: Arkansas
data.capitalGains: 50% exclusion on AR assets held 12+ months

data.name: California
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at up to 13.3% (highest in US)

data.name: Colorado
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income; exclusion for CO real property

data.name: Connecticut
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at up to 6.99%

data.name: Delaware
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at up to 6.6%

data.name: District of Columbia
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at up to 10.75%

data.name: Florida
data.capitalGains: No state tax on capital gains

data.name: Georgia
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at 5.19%

data.name: Hawaii
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at up to 11%

data.name: Idaho
data.capitalGains: Up to 60% exclusion on Idaho-sourced capital gains

data.name: Illinois
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at 4.95%

data.name: Indiana
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at 3.05%

data.name: Iowa
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at 3.8%

data.name: Kansas
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income

data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at 4%

data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at up to 7.15%

data.name: Maryland
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income

data.name: Massachusetts
data.capitalGains: Short-term: 8.5%. Long-term: 5%. Long-term collectibles: 12%. Plus 4% surtax above $1,107,750 in 2026.

data.name: Michigan
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at 4.25%

data.name: Minnesota
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at up to 9.85%

data.name: Mississippi
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income

data.name: Missouri
data.capitalGains: Eligible individuals may subtract 100% of federally reported capital gains under current Missouri DOR guidance; verify Form MO-A.

data.name: Montana
data.capitalGains: Separate Montana net long-term capital gains table; ordinary income uses 4.7% and 5.9% rates.

data.name: Nebraska
data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income

data.capitalGains: No state tax on capital gains

data.capitalGains: No state tax on capital gains

data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at up to 10.75%

data.capitalGains: 40% deduction on certain capital gains

data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income at up to 10.9%

data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income

data.capitalGains: Taxed as regular income
